name: ai-agent
description: Personal AI agent identity (open-claw / nano-claw / hermes and the like). Mints an agent DID whose document carries a signing key (authentication + assertionMethod) and a key-agreement key (keyAgreement, for authcrypt + sealed-transfer), plus a single DIDCommMessaging service routing inbound traffic through the operator's shared mediator. This is the VTA-minted counterpart to a self-generated did:key + device/register: after provisioning, the agent is enrolled as a Service consumer (consumerKind serviceKind 'ai-agent') via the device/* trust tasks and granted a least-privilege capability set (typically sign-trust-task + vault-read/fill-release). URL or WEBVH_SERVER is required at provision time so the VTA can publish the did:webvh log, but neither appears in the rendered document.
